entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate-smart nutri-cereal known for low water and energy footprints and high micronutrient content

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A health concern resulting from insufficient iron intake, particularly in underprivileged populations

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A health concern resulting from insufficient zinc intake, particularly in underprivileged populations

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures where micronutrient malnutrition is prevalent

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART CROP
entities.description: Crops that are resilient to climate change and have low environmental footprints

entities.name: LOW WATER AND ENERGY FOOTPRINT
entities.description: The characteristic of requiring minimal water and energy for production

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Adverse agro-ecological condition involving elevated heat

entities.name: LIMITED RAINFALL
entities.description: Adverse agro-ecological condition involving low precipitation

entities.name: NUTRI-CEREAL
entities.description: Cereals with high nutritional value and health-promoting traits

entities.name: GRAIN IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron present in the grains of a crop

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of zinc present in the grains of a crop

entities.name: METABOLIZABLE ENERGY
entities.description: The energy available to the body from the food consumed

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT AND POLYPHENOLS
entities.description: Health-promoting compounds that protect cells from damage

entities.name: SLOWLY DIGESTIBLE STARCHES
entities.description: Starches that are broken down slowly during digestion

entities.name: DIETARY FIBERS
entities.description: Non-digestible carbohydrates that support digestive health

entities.name: ESSENTIAL AMINO ACID PROFILE
entities.description: The composition of amino acids necessary for human health

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic information among individuals within a population

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to link phenotypic traits to specific regions of the genome

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT METABOLISM
entities.description: The biological processes involved in the uptake and utilization of micronutrients

entities.name: GENETIC AND GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Tools and materials used for genetic study, including populations and markers

entities.name: RIL MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Line populations used for genetic mapping

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING PANELS
entities.description: Collections of diverse genotypes used to identify genomic regions associated with traits

entities.name: CSSLS
entities.description: Chromosome Segment Substitution Lines used for precise trait mapping

entities.name: TILLING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Targeting Induced Local Lesions in Genomes populations used for functional genomics

entities.name: GENOMIC MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genetic diversity and mapping

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used for high-resolution mapping

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing technology

entities.name: GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing the genome of multiple individuals to identify variations

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME
entities.description: A high-quality representative genome sequence of a species

entities.name: NUTRIGENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the interaction between nutrition and the genome
